name: maestro
description: A minimal music player for Mac with QQ Music integration, inspired by Douban FM

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:renderer" "sleep 3 && npm run dev:electron"
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron
scripts.test: cd packages/server && ts-node src/music/search.test.ts && ts-node src/match/match.test.ts && ts-node src/reco/reco.test.ts && ts-node src/music/spotify.test.ts && ts-node src/music/qq.provider.test.ts && ts-node src/common/storage.test.ts && ts-node src/music/like.e2e.test.ts && ts-node src/music/search-unified.e2e.test.ts

author: tangshuai89
